parsed_review.summary: CP00-711 is a well-formed descriptor-only RP23 finance-integrations closeout pack (40 units, RP23.P06.M07.S07-RP23.P06.M09.S02) in the correct pending-hardened-review state, and its evidence chain supports advancement. Binding/requirements (registry.js:290,2553), service descriptor (service.js:151), validators (validators.js:8), tests (model.test.js:50-52), README:70, contract latest_pack/projection (external-integrations-ii-contract.json:66,21088) and next-pack-queue all agree on scope, distribution (implementation 12 / security_audit 10 / ui 8 / claude_review 2 / test 8 = 40; M07=16, M08=22, M09=2), and handoff to CP00-712/RP23.P06.M09.S03. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced everywhere: NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION, per-row descriptor_only:true + runtime_execution:false + no raw/financial/credential payloads, and validator guards against runtime opening, cross-tenant access, permission/audit body exposure, and real financial data. Authority boundary is preserved: claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, and Hermes emits_runtime_receipt=false (deterministic review packet/receipt only, not product runtime). construction-inspection (PENDING_REVIEW, production_ready=false), manifest (in_progress, production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false), adjudication (findings pending), and claude-review-result (pending_review) are mutually consistent with no premature production_ready claim. Review hardening checks pass: readiness auth-preflight succeeded with valid non-empty JSON (1439 bytes), tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob, forbidden_tools_present=false, and all ten required validation commands plus npm test/build recorded exit 0. Unrelated dirty files are correctly excluded from pack scope. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. blocks_goal_closeout=false because the pack makes no runtime or enterprise-trust claim and the human/enterprise final-approval authority boundary is expected and out of scope for this receipt.
